findings.description: PascalCase class name 'Main' is referenced in s2 content (「Javaコマンドから Main を実行することによって開始され」) but is absent from s2 hints.
findings.source_evidence: **プロセス制御部分** は、 Javaコマンドから :doc:`../handler/Main` を実行することによって開始され

findings.description: Four PascalCase handler class names that appear in the s4 handler queue and/or processing flows are missing from s4 hints: 'Main' (first handler in queue, appears in multiple flows), 'ThreadContextClearHandler' (appears twice in the handler queue at positions 4 and 12), 'MessageReplyHandler' (appears in nearly every processing flow), and 'MessagingAction' (appears in multiple flows including normalreply, errorreply, abort, retryerror).
findings.source_evidence: HandlerQueue includes Main, ThreadContextClearHandler (×2), MessageReplyHandler, MessagingAction; all appear in multiple Flow entries in the source JavaScript.
